documentPacket.description: JSON string with five sub-objects: bol, certificateOfOrigin, insuranceCertificate, cargoManifest, qualityCertificate. Each holds extracted fields in snake_case: voyage_id, vessel_name, shipper_name, consignee_name, origin_port_code, destination_port_code, cargo_description, gross_weight_kg, declared_value_usd, plus notify_party, issuing_country, policy_number, inspection_date, qc_officer where applicable.

docResult.description: PASS if all five consistency checks pass. REVIEW if exactly one document is missing/unreadable/malformed such that re-uploading it could fix the case. FAIL if documents hard-contradict each other or documentPacket is invalid JSON.

docComment.description: Concise sentence (no more than 20 words) explicitly naming the involved document(s) and the failure cause (or success on PASS).

flaggedDocument.description: The document key most directly responsible for the result. On REVIEW: the document to re-upload. On FAIL: the document carrying the conflicting/invalid value (treat BoL as canonical; manifest for weight delta; quality for date issues; the doc with the stale value for amendment failures). On PASS or invalid-JSON FAIL: empty string. Values: bol, manifest, coo, insurance, or quality.
